Package org.springdoc.core.properties

Class SwaggerUiConfigProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.properties.AbstractSwaggerUiConfigProperties
org.springdoc.core.properties.SwaggerUiConfigProperties
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean
@Lazy(false) @Configuration(proxyBeanMethods=false) @ConfigurationProperties(prefix="springdoc.swagger-ui") @ConditionalOnProperty(name="springdoc.swagger-ui.enabled", matchIfMissing=true) @ConditionalOnBean(SpringDocConfiguration.class) public class SwaggerUiConfigProperties extends AbstractSwaggerUiConfigProperties implements org.springframework.beans.factory.InitializingBean
The type Swagger ui config properties.
Author:
bnasslahsen
